.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(52, 52, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #343434 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#343434, color-mix(in srgb, #343434 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #343434 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#343434, color-mix(in srgb, #343434 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(52, 52, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(52, 52, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(223, 74, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(52, 52, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(223, 74, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(52, 52, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(52, 52, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(52, 52, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(223, 74, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead th.background: rgb(44, 44, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
